zh.Rivenhall, Essex: 英國英格蘭艾可利文哈爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Montague於1315年6月出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu40歲，母親Elizabeth De Montfort43歲。她於1335年與Sir William Smythe of Carrington在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Montague于1315年6月出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu40岁，母亲Elizabeth De Montfort43岁。她于1335年与Sir William Smythe of Carrington在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Montague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: McTigue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Taidhg, ‘son of Tadhg’, a personal name originally meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’. Compare McCaig .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Montague was born in June 1315, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, was 40 and her mother, Elizabeth De Montfort, was 43. She married Sir William Smythe of Carrington in 1335, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Montague est née en juin 1315, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Montfort, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Smythe of Carrington en 1335, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Montague im Juni 1315 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu 40 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth De Montfort 43. Sie hat 1335 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Sir William Smythe of Carrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Montague è nata il nel giugno 1315 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth De Montfort, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Smythe of Carrington nel 1335, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Montagueが1315年6月にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William Montagu 2nd Baron Montaguは40歳，母Elizabeth De Montfortは43歳であった。1335年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでSir William Smythe of Carringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Montague(이)가 1315년 6월 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Montfort(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1335년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Sir William Smythe of Carrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Montague nasceu em junho de 1315, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Montfort, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Smythe of Carrington em 1335, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Montague родилась июнь 1315 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Montfort, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Smythe of Carrington в 1335 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine Montague nació en junio de 1315, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Montfort, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sir William Smythe of Carrington en 1335, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
